research.authPattern: Google OAuth, email magic links, SAML SSO, Better Auth with Drizzle adapter
research.dataModel: Workspace → Teams → Issues, with Projects and Cycles as cross-cutting groupings, Initiatives above Projects. Custom Views, Triage queue, Inbox/Notifications, Roadmap/Timeline, Dashboards.
research.summary: Linear is a keyboard-first issue tracking and project management tool for software teams. Core features: Issues with workflow states, Projects with milestones, Cycles (sprints), Initiatives (roadmap), Custom Views (board/list/timeline), Triage queue, Inbox & Notifications, Dashboards & Analytics, Cmd+K command palette, extensive keyboard shortcuts, integrations API with webhooks and GraphQL, AI-powered triage.

features: Issues — create, assign, prioritize, estimate, label, sub-issues, relations (blocking/blocked), workflow states
Teams — workspace structure with team-scoped issues and unique IDs (e.g. ENG-123)
Projects — time-bound deliverables with milestones, status updates, progress tracking
Cycles — automated repeating sprints, auto-rollover, burndown charts
Initiatives — high-level strategic goals organizing multiple projects
Custom Views — filter-based dynamic views (board, list, timeline layouts)
Triage — intake queue for incoming issues
Inbox & Notifications — personal inbox for assignments, mentions, updates
Roadmap / Timeline — timeline view for projects with dates and progress
Dashboards & Analytics — velocity, cycle progress, burndown, workload charts
Command Menu (Cmd+K) — full command palette + keyboard shortcuts
Auth — Google OAuth, email magic links, workspace invitations
